records.ety: [OF. dignifier, fr. LL. dignificare; L. dignus worthy + ficare (in comp.), facere to make. See Deign, and Fact.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Dignified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Dignifying.]

defs: To invest with dignity or honor; to make illustrious; to give distinction to; to exalt in rank; to honor.
quotes: Your worth will dignify our feast.
